summary: A Go-based orchestration and assertion testing framework with plugin support and Kubernetes integration
concerns: Key hot files are test files, suggesting core logic may lack documentation or tests are the primary source of truth
Uncommitted changes (1 modified, 1 staged) in an active development branch
Multiple config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra) could lead to configuration sprawl
suggestions: Focus on internal/runner/runner.go and assertion.go as they appear to be the core execution engine
Consolidate configuration directories to reduce ambiguity
Ensure implementation files have adequate documentation since tests are the most referenced files
